status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: UAE financial free zone with its own independent legal/regulatory system, separate from UAE federal law.

data.official_name: DIFC Data Protection Law No. 5 of 2020
data.notes: GDPR-aligned data protection regime for the DIFC free zone, independent of UAE federal PDPL (secid:regulation/uaelegislation.gov.ae/pdpl). Enforced by the DIFC Commissioner of Data Protection.
